title: coleus minor
intro: Coleus minor, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a tropical plant species native to South Asia, characterized by its small, fragrant leaves and purple, blue, or white flowers. Traditionally, Coleus minor is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Coleus minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
